    <h1 {...{
      "id": "create-renditions"
    }}>{`Create Renditions`}</h1>
    <p>{`Renditions are different output versions of a document or element made for specific purposes; for example, a high-quality PDF for printing, a smaller JPG for sharing online, a PNG snapshot of a specific design element, or a PPTX export for presenting in meetings or editing in PowerPoint or Google Slides.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "what-are-renditions-used-for"
    }}>{`What Are Renditions Used For?`}</h2>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Download and sharing`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Preview and processing`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Print preparation`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Document publishing`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Cross-platform compatibility`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Element thumbnails and snapshots`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "two-approaches-for-creating-renditions"
    }}>{`Two Approaches for Creating Renditions`}</h2>
    <p>{`Adobe Express add-ons support two approaches for creating renditions:`}</p>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Page/Document Renditions`}</strong>{` (Add-on UI SDK): Export entire pages or documents in various formats (JPG, PNG, MP4, PDF, PPTX) using `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "#basic-usage"
        }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions()`}</inlineCode></a>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Element-Level Renditions`}</strong>{` (Document Sandbox): Capture individual visual elements and their descendants as PNG or JPEG using `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "#element-level-renditions-document-sandbox"
        }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`VisualNode.createRendition()`}</inlineCode></a>{` `}<em parentName="li">{`(experimental)`}</em>{`.`}</li>
    </ol>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "quick-start"
    }}>{`Quick Start`}</h2>
    <p>{`The following snippet shows the basic API call to create a rendition for download (export intent) of the current page in PNG format. This is the core method - see the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "#example"
      }}>{`complete example`}</a>{` below for a full implementation with permissions, error handling, and file download.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`// Basic rendition creation - core API call
const rendition = await addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions(
  // renditionOptions
  {
    range: addOnUISdk.constants.Range.currentPage,
    format: addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionFormat.png,
  },
  // renditionIntent
  addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionIntent.export
);

// rendition[0].blob contains the generated file data
console.log("Generated:", rendition[0].blob.type); // "image/png"
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "basic-usage"
    }}>{`Basic Usage`}</h2>
    <p>{`The `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/app-document.md#createrenditions"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`createRenditions`}</inlineCode></a>{` method is used to create renditions of the current page or the entire document in different formats. The method accepts two parameters:`}</p>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol"><a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/app-document.md#renditionoptions"
        }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`renditionOptions`}</inlineCode></a>{`: controls the `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "#page-ranges"
        }}>{`page range`}</a>{` that is meant to be exported and the `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "#supported-formats"
        }}>{`file format`}</a>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/addonsdk-constants.md"
        }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`renditionIntent`}</inlineCode></a>{` constant (optional): controls the `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "#rendition-intents"
        }}>{`intent`}</a>{` of the rendition (e.g. `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`RenditionIntent.export`}</inlineCode>{`).`}</li>
    </ol>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "supported-formats"
    }}>{`Supported Formats`}</h3>
    <p>{`Export your designs as:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`JPG - "image/jpeg" - Optimized for photos and social media`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`PNG - "image/png" - Perfect for graphics with transparency`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`MP4 - "video/mp4" - For video content`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`PDF - "application/pdf" - Professional documents and printing`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`PPTX - "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation" - PowerPoint presentations`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`The `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/addonsdk-constants.md"
      }}>{`RenditionFormat constants`}</a>{` can be used to set the format of the rendition over the MIME types specifically (e.g. `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionFormat.jpg`}</inlineCode>{`).`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "pptx-export-and-document-type"
    }}>{`PPTX Export and Document Type`}</h3>
    <p>{`PPTX export is only available for presentation-type documents. Call `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/app-document.md#ispresentation"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`isPresentation()`}</inlineCode></a>{` before offering the PPTX format to users. When it returns `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`false`}</inlineCode>{`, hide or disable the PPTX export option.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="warning" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`IMPORTANT:`}</strong>{` The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`isPresentation()`}</inlineCode>{` method is currently `}<em parentName="p">{`experimental only`}</em>{` and requires the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`experimentalApis`}</inlineCode>{` flag set to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`true`}</inlineCode>{` in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/manifest/index.md#requirements"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`requirements`}</inlineCode></a>{` section of `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`// Only offer PPTX export when the document is a presentation
const isPresentation = await addOnUISdk.app.document.isPresentation();

if (isPresentation) {
  // Show PPTX option and create rendition when selected
  const rendition = await addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions(
    {
      range: addOnUISdk.constants.Range.entireDocument,
      format: addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionFormat.pptx,
    },
    addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionIntent.export
  );
  // ... trigger download
} else {
  // Hide PPTX option or show message that PPTX is only available for presentations
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "page-ranges"
    }}>{`Page Ranges`}</h3>
    <p>{`Target specific content:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`currentPage`}</inlineCode>{` - Export just the current page`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`entireDocument`}</inlineCode>{` - Export all pages`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`The `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/addonsdk-constants.md"
      }}>{`Range constants`}</a>{` can be used to set the range of the rendition (e.g. `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Range.currentPage`}</inlineCode>{`).`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "rendition-intents"
    }}>{`Rendition Intents`}</h3>
    <p>{`Control how the content is used:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`export`}</inlineCode>{` - For download and sharing`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`preview`}</inlineCode>{` - For display only (no download)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`print`}</inlineCode>{` - For printing workflows`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`The `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/addonsdk-constants.md"
      }}>{`RenditionIntent constants`}</a>{` can be used to set the intent of the rendition (e.g. `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.export`}</inlineCode>{`).`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "export-permissions-and-collaborative-workflows"
    }}>{`Export Permissions and Collaborative Workflows`}</h2>
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`exportAllowed()`}</inlineCode>{` method determines whether the current document can be exported based on its review status in collaborative workflows. This applies to `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://business.adobe.com/products/workfront/integrations/express.html"
      }}>{`enterprise customers using Adobe Express's review and approval features`}</a>{`, where documents may be restricted from export until approved by designated reviewers.`}</p>
    <p>{`Before creating renditions for export or print purposes, you can check that it's permitted first using the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/app-document.md#exportallowed"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`exportAllowed()`}</inlineCode></a>{` method:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`// Check export permissions before creating non-preview renditions
const canExport = await addOnUISdk.app.document.exportAllowed();

if (!canExport) {
  // Export/print not allowed, but preview renditions are still permitted
  console.log("Export restricted - only preview available");

  // Create preview rendition (always allowed)
  const previewRendition = await addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions(
    { range: addOnUISdk.constants.Range.currentPage, format: addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionFormat.png },
    addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionIntent.preview
  );
  // ... show in UI only, don't allow download
  return;
}

// Proceed with export renditions if allowed
`}</code></pre>
    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="info" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Important:`}</strong>{` This check is only necessary for `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.export`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.print`}</inlineCode>{` for documents that are under review. Renditions created with `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.preview`}</inlineCode>{` are always allowed, regardless of the document's review status.`}</p>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Why check export permissions first?`}</strong>{` If you skip this check and attempt to create export/print renditions when the document doesn't allow exports, users may see an error message such as "Request approval" and "Get approval from your viewers before sharing this file". Checking `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`exportAllowed()`}</inlineCode>{` first lets you provide a better user experience by either offering preview-only options or explaining why export is restricted.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="info" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`To allow the user to download the rendition, the `}<strong parentName="p">{`"permissions"`}</strong>{` section should include `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`"allow-downloads"`}</inlineCode>{` in the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`"sandbox"`}</inlineCode>{` array.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  "testId": "cbe48204-578d-47cc-9ad4-a9aaa81dc3d3",
  "name": "Hello World", "version": "1.0.0", "manifestVersion": 2,
  "requirements": {
    "apps": [ { "name": "Express", "apiVersion": 1 } ],
  },
  "entryPoints": [
    {
      "type": "panel", "id": "panel1", "main": "index.html",
      "documentSandbox": "sandbox/code.js",
      "permissions": {
        "sandbox": [
          "allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox",
          "allow-popups",
          "allow-downloads" 👈 👀
        ]
      }
    }
  ]
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "the-preview-intent"
    }}>{`The Preview Intent`}</h2>
    <p>{`When the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`renditionIntent`}</inlineCode>{` is set to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.preview`}</inlineCode>{`, the output is created for `}<strong parentName="p">{`preview purposes only`}</strong>{`. This means that the rendition is not meant to be downloaded or shared; for example, because the user is not on a paid Adobe Express plan and the design contains Premium content.`}</p>
    <p>{`In this case, preview renditions are used either for processing purposes (e.g., if the add-on needs to perform data analysis on the design), or to be displayed in the add-on's panel or in a new window—making sure users cannot extract the content. Please see `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "./premium_content.md#allow-only-the-preview-of-premium-content"
      }}>{`this page`}</a>{` for more detail on handling such scenarios.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="info" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`When the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`renditionIntent`}</inlineCode>{` is set to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.preview`}</inlineCode>{`, you must add to the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{` a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`"renditionPreview"`}</inlineCode>{` flag set to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`true`}</inlineCode>{` in the `}<strong parentName="p">{`"requirements"`}</strong>{` section.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  "testId": "cbe48204-578d-47cc-9ad4-a9aaa81dc3d3",
  "name": "Hello World", "version": "1.0.0", "manifestVersion": 2,
  "requirements": {
    "apps": [ { "name": "Express", "apiVersion": 1 } ],
    "renditionPreview": true 👈 👀
  },
  "entryPoints": [
    // ...
  ]
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "export-and-download-workflow"
    }}>{`Export and Download Workflow`}</h2>
    <p>{`Use the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`createRenditions`}</inlineCode>{` method to allow users to download or share your content in different formats. This is a multi-step process that involves:`}</p>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Creating a new rendition`}</strong>{` based on specific export configuration options via the `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/app-document.md#createrenditions"
        }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`createRenditions()`}</inlineCode></a>{` method of the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`addOnUISdk.app.document`}</inlineCode>{` object.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Converting`}</strong>{` the returned `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`blob`}</inlineCode>{` object into a URL via the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`URL.createObjectURL()`}</inlineCode>{` method.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Creating a downloadable link`}</strong>{` for the user to download the rendition, e.g., using the URL string from the previous step as the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`href`}</inlineCode>{` attribute of an `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`<a>`}</inlineCode>{` element.`}</li>
    </ol>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "example"
    }}>{`Example`}</h3>
    <p>{`This complete example builds on the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "#quick-start"
      }}>{`Quick Start`}</a>{` above by adding production-ready features: permission checks, error handling, `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "#export-permissions-and-collaborative-workflows"
      }}>{`export restrictions`}</a>{`, and file downloads. The example creates a PNG rendition of the current page when the user clicks a button.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`import addOnUISdk from "https://express.adobe.com/static/add-on-sdk/sdk.js";

addOnUISdk.ready.then(async () => {
  // Attach the rendition creation to a button click event
  document
    .querySelector("#download-button")
    .addEventListener("click", async () => {
      // Check if export is allowed (prevents "Request approval" error dialog)
      const canExport = await addOnUISdk.app.document.exportAllowed();

      if (!canExport) {
        try {
            // Show informational message for preview
            let dialogOptions = {
              variant: "information",
              title: "Requires approval",
              description:
                "Content export/download is restricted while the document is under review and requires approval. Showing preview instead.",
              buttonLabels: { primary: "Ok", cancel: "Cancel" },
            };
            const result = await addOnUISdk.app.showModalDialog(dialogOptions);
            console.log("Button type clicked " + result.buttonType);
        } catch (error) {
            console.log("Error showing modal dialog:", error);
        }

        // Create preview rendition (always allowed). You will need to add the \`"renditionPreview"\` flag to the \`manifest.json\` file in order to create preview renditions.
        const previewRendition = await addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions(
          {
            range: addOnUISdk.constants.Range.currentPage,
            format: addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionFormat.png,
          },
          addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionIntent.preview
        );

        // Display preview in UI only (don't trigger download)
        const previewUrl = URL.createObjectURL(previewRendition[0].blob);
        const img = document.createElement("img");
        img.src = previewUrl;
        document.body.appendChild(img);
        return;
      }

      // Create a rendition for download (export intent)
      const rendition = await addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions(
        // renditionOptions
        {
          range: addOnUISdk.constants.Range.currentPage,
          format: addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionFormat.png,
        },
        // renditionIntent
        addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionIntent.export
      );

      console.log("Renditions created: ", rendition);
      // [{
      //   type: "page",
      //   blob: { size: 16195, type: "image/png" },
      //   title: "",
      //   metadata: { ... },
      // }];

      // Convert the blob into a URL to be consumed by an anchor element
      const downloadUrl = URL.createObjectURL(rendition[0].blob);

      // Create a temp/disposable anchor element to trigger the download
      const a = document.createElement("a");
      a.href = downloadUrl; // Set the URL
      a.download = "Preview_rendition.png"; // Set the desired file name
      document.body.appendChild(a); // Add the anchor to the DOM
      a.click(); // Trigger the download
      document.body.removeChild(a); // Clean up
      URL.revokeObjectURL(downloadUrl); // Release the object URL
    });
});
`}</code></pre>
    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="info" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`For more details and example code, see the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/app-document.md#createrenditions"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`createRenditions()`}</inlineCode></a>{` API References.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "advanced-rendition-options"
    }}>{`Advanced Rendition Options`}</h2>
    <p>{`The Adobe Express Add-on SDK provides `}<strong parentName="p">{`specialized rendition options`}</strong>{` for different file formats, such as `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/app-document.md#jpgrenditionoptions"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`JpgRenditionOptions`}</inlineCode></a>{`, `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/app-document.md#pngrenditionoptions"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`PngRenditionOptions`}</inlineCode></a>{`, `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/app-document.md#pdfrenditionoptions"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`PdfRenditionOptions`}</inlineCode></a>{`, and `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/app-document.md#pptxrenditionoptions"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`PptxRenditionOptions`}</inlineCode></a>{`. Each format has specific properties that can be set to control the output of the rendition.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="info" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Note:`}</strong>{` When `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`renditionIntent`}</inlineCode>{` is not specified in the examples below, it defaults to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.export`}</inlineCode>{`. This means the renditions are created for download and sharing purposes.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "jpg-quality-and-size-options"
    }}>{`JPG Quality and Size Options`}</h3>
    <p>{`The following example shows how to create a rendition of the current page in JPG format with a quality of 85% and a requested size of 600x600 pixels.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`const jpgRendition = await addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions(
  // JpgRenditionOptions
  {
    range: addOnUISdk.constants.Range.currentPage,
    format: addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionFormat.jpg,
    // number in the range [0, 1]
    quality: 0.85,
    // no upscaling, result depends on the original image size/ratio
    requestedSize: { width: 600, height: 600 },
  }
);
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "png-transparency-and-file-size-limits"
    }}>{`PNG Transparency and File Size Limits`}</h3>
    <p>{`The example below shows how to create a rendition of the current page in PNG format with a transparent background, a strict file size limit of 500KB, and a requested size of 800x600 pixels.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`const pngRendition = await addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions(
  // PngRenditionOptions
  {
    range: addOnUISdk.constants.Range.currentPage,
    format: addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionFormat.png,
    // Transparent background for web overlays
    backgroundColor: 0x00000000,
    // Strict file size limit for fast web loading
    fileSizeLimit: 500,
    fileSizeLimitUnit: addOnUISdk.constants.FileSizeLimitUnit.KB,
    // Web-friendly dimensions
    requestedSize: { width: 800, height: 600 },
  }
);
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "pdf-bleed-settings"
    }}>{`PDF Bleed Settings`}</h3>
    <p>{`Use the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`bleed`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`margin`}</inlineCode>{` properties from the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`PdfRenditionOptions`}</inlineCode>{` interface to control the bleed and margin of the PDF rendition, as shown in the example below.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`const pdfRendition = await addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions(
  // PdfRenditionOptions
  {
    range: addOnUISdk.constants.Range.currentPage,
    format: addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionFormat.pdf,
    bleed: { amount: 5, unit: addOnUISdk.constants.BleedUnit.mm },
  }
);
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "pptx-multi-page-export"
    }}>{`PPTX Multi-Page Export`}</h3>
    <p>{`The following example shows how to create a rendition of the entire document in PPTX format.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`const pptxRenditions = await addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions(
  // PptxRenditionOptions
  {
    range: addOnUISdk.constants.Range.entireDocument,
    format: addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionFormat.pptx,
  }
);
`}</code></pre>
    <InlineAlert slots="text1, text2" variant="info" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`PPTX Export Considerations:`}</strong>{` PPTX export is only available for presentation-type documents in Adobe Express. When implementing PPTX export in your add-on, consider informing users that fonts from Adobe Express might look different in PowerPoint, and that videos, audio, presenter notes, and animations will not be included in the exported file. Adobe Express displays a similar disclaimer when users download PPTX files directly from the app, shown below:`}</p>

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "element-level-renditions-document-sandbox"
    }}>{`Element-Level Renditions (Document Sandbox)`}</h2>
    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="warning" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`IMPORTANT:`}</strong>{` The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`VisualNode.createRendition()`}</inlineCode>{` method is currently `}<strong parentName="p"><em parentName="strong">{`experimental only`}</em></strong>{` and should not be used in any add-ons you will be distributing until it has been declared stable. To use it, you will first need to set the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`experimentalApis`}</inlineCode>{` flag to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`true`}</inlineCode>{` in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/manifest/index.md#requirements"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`requirements`}</inlineCode></a>{` section of the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <p>{`In addition to exporting entire pages or documents, you can generate renditions of `}<strong parentName="p">{`individual visual elements`}</strong>{` directly from the Document Sandbox using `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/document-sandbox/document-apis/classes/VisualNode.md#createrendition"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`VisualNode.createRendition()`}</inlineCode></a>{`.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "when-to-use-element-level-renditions"
    }}>{`When to Use Element-Level Renditions`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Capture a specific shape, group, or text element without surrounding content`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Generate thumbnails of individual design components`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Export selected elements for processing or analysis`}</li>
    </ul>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "basic-usage-1"
    }}>{`Basic Usage`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`import { editor, CreateRenditionFormat } from "express-document-sdk";

const rectangle = editor.createRectangle();
rectangle.width = 200;
rectangle.height = 100;
editor.context.insertionParent.children.append(rectangle);

// Generate a PNG rendition of the node
const result = await rectangle.createRendition({
  format: CreateRenditionFormat.png,
  scale: 2  // 2x scale for higher resolution
});

if (result.blob) {
  console.log("Rendition type:", result.blob.type);  // "image/png"
  console.log("Rendition size:", result.blob.size);
}
`}</code></pre>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "example-capture-selected-elements"
    }}>{`Example: Capture Selected Elements`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`import { editor, CreateRenditionFormat } from "express-document-sdk";

const selection = editor.context.selection;
if (selection.length === 0) {
  console.log("No elements selected");
  return;
}

for (const node of selection) {
  const result = await node.createRendition({
    format: CreateRenditionFormat.png,
    scale: 1
  });
  
  if (result.blob) {
    console.log(\`Captured \${node.type}: \${result.blob.size} bytes\`);
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "important-considerations"
    }}>{`Important Considerations`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Image loading timeout`}</strong>{`: The method waits up to 20 seconds for images to load before throwing an error.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Transparent background`}</strong>{`: Element renditions capture only the node content with a transparent background.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Descendants included`}</strong>{`: The rendition includes the node and all its descendants.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "sending-renditions-to-the-ui"
    }}>{`Sending Renditions to the UI`}</h3>
    <p>{`Pass blob data through the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/document-sandbox/communication/index.md"
      }}>{`Communication APIs`}</a>{` to use renditions in your UI:`}</p>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Document Sandbox (`}<inlineCode parentName="strong">{`code.js`}</inlineCode>{`):`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`import addOnSandboxSdk from "add-on-sdk-document-sandbox";
import { editor, CreateRenditionFormat } from "express-document-sdk";

const { runtime } = addOnSandboxSdk.instance;

runtime.exposeApi({
  async captureCurrentSelection() {
    const selection = editor.context.selection;
    if (selection.length === 0) return null;
    
    const result = await selection[0].createRendition({
      format: CreateRenditionFormat.png,
      scale: 1
    });
    return result.blob;
  }
});
`}</code></pre>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`UI Code:`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`import addOnUISdk from "https://express.adobe.com/static/add-on-sdk/sdk.js";

addOnUISdk.ready.then(async () => {
  const sandboxApi = await addOnUISdk.instance.runtime.apiProxy("documentSandbox");
  
  document.querySelector("#capture-btn").addEventListener("click", async () => {
    const blob = await sandboxApi.captureCurrentSelection();
    if (blob) {
      const img = document.createElement("img");
      img.src = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      document.body.appendChild(img);
    }
  });
});
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "faqs"
    }}>{`FAQs`}</h2>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-how-do-i-create-a-rendition"
    }}>{`Q: How do I create a rendition?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Call `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions(options, intent)`}</inlineCode>{` to export pages in different formats.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-what-file-formats-are-supported"
    }}>{`Q: What file formats are supported?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` JPG, PNG, MP4, PDF, and PPTX formats via `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`addOnUISdk.constants.RenditionFormat`}</inlineCode>{`. See the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../references/addonsdk/addonsdk-constants.md"
      }}>{`RenditionFormat constants`}</a>{` for more details.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-how-do-i-export-content-for-download"
    }}>{`Q: How do I export content for download?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Create rendition, convert blob to URL with `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`URL.createObjectURL()`}</inlineCode>{`, then use anchor element to trigger download.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-what-permissions-are-needed-for-downloads"
    }}>{`Q: What permissions are needed for downloads?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Add `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`"allow-downloads"`}</inlineCode>{` to the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`"sandbox"`}</inlineCode>{` array in manifest permissions.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-should-i-check-export-permissions-before-creating-renditions"
    }}>{`Q: Should I check export permissions before creating renditions?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Yes, always call `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`await addOnUISdk.app.document.exportAllowed()`}</inlineCode>{` before using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.export`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.print`}</inlineCode>{` to avoid approval error dialogs.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-when-do-i-need-to-check-exportallowed"
    }}>{`Q: When do I need to check exportAllowed()?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Check before creating renditions with `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.export`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.print`}</inlineCode>{`. Preview renditions with `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.preview`}</inlineCode>{` are always allowed.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-what-happens-if-i-dont-check-export-permissions-first"
    }}>{`Q: What happens if I don't check export permissions first?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Users may see error dialogs like "Request approval" and "Get approval from your viewers before sharing this file" in collaborative workflows.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-what-should-i-do-when-export-is-not-allowed"
    }}>{`Q: What should I do when export is not allowed?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Create preview renditions instead using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.preview`}</inlineCode>{`, show informational messages, and display content in UI only without download options.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-what-is-the-preview-intent-for"
    }}>{`Q: What is the preview intent for?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Preview intent creates renditions for processing or display only, not for download or sharing.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-how-do-i-set-jpg-quality"
    }}>{`Q: How do I set JPG quality?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Use `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`quality`}</inlineCode>{` property (0-1 range) in `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`JpgRenditionOptions`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-whats-required-for-preview-intent"
    }}>{`Q: What's required for preview intent?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Set `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`"renditionPreview": true`}</inlineCode>{` in manifest requirements section.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-how-do-i-export-the-current-page-only"
    }}>{`Q: How do I export the current page only?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Use `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`range: addOnUISdk.constants.Range.currentPage`}</inlineCode>{` in rendition options.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-when-should-i-use-ispresentation"
    }}>{`Q: When should I use isPresentation()?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` Use `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`isPresentation()`}</inlineCode>{` before offering PPTX export. PPTX is only available for presentation-type documents; when it returns `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`false`}</inlineCode>{`, hide or disable the PPTX option. Requires `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`experimentalApis`}</inlineCode>{` in manifest.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "q-what-is-the-default-rendition-intent-if-i-dont-specify-one"
    }}>{`Q: What is the default rendition intent if I don't specify one?`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`A:`}</strong>{` The default `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`renditionIntent`}</inlineCode>{` is `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`RenditionIntent.export`}</inlineCode>{`, which creates renditions for download and sharing purposes.`}</p>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
